name: claude-agentic-designer
description: Multi-agent, on-brand presentation designer. Extracts brand tokens from a master deck, builds real .pptx slides via python-pptx, renders previews, and scores them against a rubric — auto-starting a companion UI that lights up each agent.
long_description: Runs the Claude Agentic Designer workflow locally over stdio. Claude orchestrates the design_system -> content -> structure -> layout -> builder -> reflection -> evaluator agents by calling these tools. Every call emits an event, so the bundled companion UI (FastAPI event server + React app) visualizes the run in real time. The extension auto-starts that UI the first time it is used. Windows note: slide rendering uses PowerPoint via COM when available.

tools.name: start_run
tools.description: Begin a new design run; returns run_id, enabled references, and the rubric.

tools.name: list_reference_files
tools.description: List the brand master + example files the user configured.

tools.name: extract_design_tokens
tools.description: Extract palette, fonts, type scale, and layouts from a master deck.

tools.name: build_presentation
tools.description: Build a real .pptx from a slide plan using python-pptx.

tools.name: render_presentation
tools.description: Render slide previews (PowerPoint COM on Windows, LibreOffice fallback).

tools.name: evaluate_presentation
tools.description: Score the deck against the rubric and return pass/fail with feedback.

tools.name: log_event
tools.description: Emit a progress event so the companion UI lights up the active agent.

tools.name: finish_run
tools.description: Finalize the run and return the output artifact paths.

tools.name: get_workflow_guide
tools.description: Return the orchestration guide for a given document type.
